query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS swap_validations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  incumbent_material_id INT NOT NULL,
  sustainable_material_id INT NOT NULL,
  project_id INT,
  validation_status ENUM('APPROVED', 'EXPERIMENTAL', 'REJECTED') NOT NULL,
  overall_score DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  showstopper_results JSON NOT NULL,
  passed_checks INT NOT NULL,
  failed_checks INT NOT NULL,
  skipped_checks INT NOT NULL,
  recommendation TEXT NOT NULL,
  incumbent_total_cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  sustainable_total_cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  cost_delta_percentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  incumbent_gwp DECIMAL(10,2),
  sustainable_gwp DECIMAL(10,2),
  carbon_reduction_percentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  csi_form_url TEXT,
  csi_form_generated_at TIMESTAMP,
  validated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP,
  requested_by INT,
  rfq_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_swap_incumbent (incumbent_material_id),
  INDEX idx_swap_sustainable (sustainable_material_id),
  INDEX idx_swap_status (validation_status),
  INDEX idx_swap_project (project_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Dbw4CNsZcxdMWq.root --database GQLTfpKngn8q3XehyUkpVP --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS swap_validations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  incumbent_material_id INT NOT NULL,
  sustainable_material_id INT NOT NULL,
  project_id INT,
  validation_status ENUM('APPROVED', 'EXPERIMENTAL', 'REJECTED') NOT NULL,
  overall_score DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  showstopper_results JSON NOT NULL,
  passed_checks INT NOT NULL,
  failed_checks INT NOT NULL,
  skipped_checks INT NOT NULL,
  recommendation TEXT NOT NULL,
  incumbent_total_cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  sustainable_total_cost DECIMAL(10,2),
  cost_delta_percentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  incumbent_gwp DECIMAL(10,2),
  sustainable_gwp DECIMAL(10,2),
  carbon_reduction_percentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  csi_form_url TEXT,
  csi_form_generated_at TIMESTAMP,
  validated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP,
  requested_by INT,
  rfq_id INT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_swap_incumbent (incumbent_material_id),
  INDEX idx_swap_sustainable (sustainable_material_id),
  INDEX idx_swap_status (validation_status),
  INDEX idx_swap_project (project_id)
);
